title: eriogonum tenellum subsp. platyphyllum
intro: Eriogonum tenellum subsp. platyphyllum, also known as a narrow-leaved buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family Polygonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum tenellum subsp. platyphyllum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a salve, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various herbal preparations.
